zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Delves II於1376年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德爾維斯時，他的父親John De Delves I26歲，母親Margaret De Calveley26歲。他於大約1399年與Phillippa Mainwaring在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年4月在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾維布波瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Delves II于1376年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德爾維斯时，他的父亲John De Delves I26岁，母亲Margaret De Calveley26岁。他于大约1399年与Phillippa Mainwaring在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1429年4月在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾維布波瑞。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Delves
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Delve , with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Delve
meanings: English: locative name, nickname from Middle English delf, delphe, delve ‘pit, quarry, canal, ditch’, denoting someone who lived by a pit, quarry, or excavation, or, in some instances, a ditcher, digger, or quarrier (Middle English delver(er)); compare William le Deluer, 1230 in Pipe Rolls (Somerset). Lettice atte Delue, 1357, cited below, is probably to be associated with John Delvere, 1359 in Colchester Court Rolls (Essex).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John De Delves II was born in 1376, in Delves, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Delves I, was 26 and his mother, Margaret De Calveley, was 26. He married Phillippa Mainwaring about 1399, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in April 1429, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Delves II est né en 1376, à Delves, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Delves I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Calveley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Phillippa Mainwaring environ 1399, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1429, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Delves II 1376 in Delves, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Delves I 26 und seine Mutter Margaret De Calveley 26. Er hat um 1399 in Cheshire, England Phillippa Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb im April 1429 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Delves II è nato il nel 1376 nel Delves, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Delves I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret De Calveley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Phillippa Mainwaring circa 1399, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1429, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Delves IIが1376年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアデルベスで生まれた時，父John De Delves Iは26歳，母Margaret De Calveleyは26歳であった。約1399年にイギリスチェシュアイアでPhillippa Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年4月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Delves II(이)가 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 델브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Delves I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret De Calveley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 체실르에서 Phillippa Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 윈이버버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Delves II nasceu em 1376, em Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Delves I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Calveley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Phillippa Mainwaring aproximadamente 1399, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1429, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Delves II родился в 1376 г. в местности делвесь, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Delves I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Calveley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Phillippa Mainwaring около 1399 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер апрель 1429 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Delves II nació en 1376, en Delves, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Delves I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret De Calveley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Phillippa Mainwaring aproximadamente 1399, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en abril de 1429, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
